claim.summary: A repeated-window live delegated queue role selected only built-in task-bank work, ran ordinary and git-backed windows separated by pauses, and closed with all 17 jobs completed successfully, trusted clean evidence, and no active lease residue.

code_changes: No production code change was required for r16.
r16 adds a temporary isolated proof driver under /tmp to exercise repeated-window role continuity using only built-in task-bank jobs.

isolated_cli_r16.preflight_mode: drain --enforce-preflight 0 because host bubblewrap preflight is unavailable in this environment

selection.ordinary_selector: deterministic filter over built-in task-bank tasks: required non-git families, suggested_commands present, acceptance contract present, no git command fragments; first three sorted candidates per family

open_limits: This is a 294-second repeated-window proof, not a multi-hour or multi-day production-duty role.
The workload uses deterministic built-in task-bank selection and no external manifest, but it is still limited to known task-bank families.
The host environment lacks working bubblewrap preflight, so this packet uses the same explicit --enforce-preflight 0 live-drain path as r10 through r15.
A stronger full A5 claim still needs multi-hour continuity, less task-bank-bound intake, and natural role closeout through the product controller rather than a proof driver closeout summary.
